info.name: Electronics eCommerce API Tests Copy 2
info.description:
API test collection for the Electronics eCommerce Shop. Organized by feature (F001-F007).

Setup:
1. Set baseUrl to http://localhost:3001 (Express API server)
2. Run F001 Login first to populate the {{token}} variable
3. For NextAuth endpoints, change baseUrl to http://localhost:3000

request.description: Links a product to the newly created order.

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "{{userId}}",
  "title": "Order Confirmed",
  "message": "Your order {{orderId}} has been successfully placed.",
  "type": "ORDER_UPDATE",
  "priority": "HIGH",
  "link": "/orders/{{orderId}}"
}

request.description: Triggers a notification for the order confirmation.
